title: Official Grand Theft Warzone
description: GTA in minecraft! From fighting with guns to driving with vehicles! Own the city with your friend and create gangs, build your businesses and buy properties!
body:
# **Grand Theft Warzone**

Experience the immersive and action-packed world of Grand Theft Warzone, where Minecraft and Grand Theft Auto collide! Create your own adventure with custom AI NPCs, business ventures, and an exciting economy system that will keep you hooked for hours. From building your empire to chasing down NPC criminals, Grand Theft Warzone transforms Minecraft into a living, breathing city full of endless possibilities.

❓**Why play it?**

This minecraft experience is different from other modpacks you played, we have created this modpack in combination and inspiration from GTA 5.

### **Key Features**

💸 **Economy**: Earn money by selling items or owning a business or property. Be the richest and build your fortune

🏘️ **Properties**: Buy your own property, use it for yourself, not happy? Rent it out and earn money with it! Place furniture, store your stuff in them. Buy it through our custom made GUI that looks amazing!

🏢 **Business**: Start buying your first business, its your first step to be a millionaire on the server! Tired of looting chests? Buy your business and start to build your fortune!

👥 **Gangs**: Not easy to do it alone? Create your gang and invite your friends! Conquer the city togheter and fight all your enemies who stand in your way!

🚗 **NPC**: A complex custom npc system added, which provides citizen npcs, but also POLICE npcs. Who are ready to kill you if you harm anyone! Police chase you with sirens, make sure to get away quick before you get catched! Also experience the npcs driving vehicles on a different level then before. Tired of just driving alone and not experiencing the immersiveness like other games. Here you can drive for hours and not get bored!

⭐ **Level**: Make sure to level up so you can build your way up, killing npcs, buying and selling will grant you XP to level up and be able to buy more stuff!

🗺️ **Minimap**: Another complex minimap added, with a GPS system. Very unique option where you can click on the location you wish to go to and it shows you the navigation to it.

**Installation Requirements**

- You will need to allocate atleast 5GB of RAM to play it

**Join our discord server** [here](https://discord.gg/PEXPPj5Bax)

**Github:** [View source code](https://github.com/Grand-Theft-Warzone)
